mapper.sql: select task_id, task_no, task_name, task_scope_type, task_status, target_dept_id, target_location_id, target_category_id, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, owner_user_id, execute_user_id, summary_total, summary_ok, summary_diff, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from asset_inventory_task

select i.item_id, i.task_id, i.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, i.expected_user_id, i.actual_user_id, i.expected_location_id, i.actual_location_id, i.expected_status, i.actual_status, i.inventory_result, i.inventory_desc, i.inventory_time, i.inventory_user_id, i.process_status, i.process_desc from asset_inventory_task_item i left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = i.asset_id
mapper.select: where i.task_id = #{taskId} order by i.item_id asc

select i.item_id, i.task_id, i.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, i.expected_user_id, a.current_user_id as actual_user_id, i.expected_location_id, a.current_location_id as actual_location_id, i.expected_status, a.asset_status as actual_status, i.inventory_result, i.inventory_desc, i.inventory_time, i.inventory_user_id, i.process_status, i.process_desc from asset_inventory_task_item i left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = i.asset_id where i.task_id = #{taskId} and (a.asset_code = #{scanCode} or a.qr_code = #{scanCode}) limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into asset_inventory_task_item ( task_id, asset_id, expected_user_id, actual_user_id, expected_location_id, actual_location_id, expected_status, actual_status, inventory_result, inventory_desc, inventory_time, inventory_user_id, process_status, process_desc ) values
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.expectedUserId}, #{item.actualUserId}, #{item.expectedLocationId}, #{item.actualLocationId}, #{item.expectedStatus}, #{item.actualStatus}, #{item.inventoryResult}, #{item.inventoryDesc}, #{item.inventoryTime}, #{item.inventoryUserId}, #{item.processStatus}, #{item.processDesc} )
mapper.update: update asset_inventory_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId}

update asset_inventory_task set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where task_id in
#{taskId}
